source: Binance official USD-M monthly 5m Kline archive
selection_rule: BINANCE_USD_M currently trading perpetual; CRYPTO_NATIVE; USDT suffix; CRYPTO_ALT_MID_ACTIVITY_PROVISIONAL; age_days>=1100; current relative_spread_bps<=3.5; no OFFICIAL_MEME_SUBTYPE; symbol does not start with a digit; exclude BTCDOMUSDT; sort current 24h notional proxy descending; take first 12
